Vishal Kumar, I validated the Key Vault reference issue and created the PR for the fix.

Dev was already resolving correctly. For Test/UAT, the Function App managed identity was missing the equivalent Key Vault Secrets User access on the environment Key Vault.

I added the Terraform role assignment and validated it against Test. After rerun and Function App restart, the Key Vault references resolved correctly and Dev remained unaffected.
